query:
SELECT id, connectionId, locationAddress, serviceType, status, notes
FROM services
WHERE serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Data', 'Broadband')
  AND status = 'active'
  AND locationAddress IS NOT NULL
  AND locationAddress != ''
LIMIT 500;
